title: Quest 34149 Cordless Steam Iron / 2400W Electric Iron/Ceramic Soleplate/Self-Cleaning/Quick Heat-Up/Adjustable Temperature & Steam Output / 350ml Water Tank
features: POWERFUL STEAM IRON – This 2400W Cordless Steam Iron will quickly and smoothly remove any creases from all kinds of fabrics. It features an adjustable thermostat, and a steam output ranging between 15 and 25g/min, with a steam burst function also included. Its water tank holds a capacity of up to 350ml.

CONVENIENT CORDLESS DESIGN – As this iron is cordless, you’ll never be restricted by cord length or tangles. The iron charges on its base, needing just 40 seconds to heat up enough for use. The charging base can also be turned 360 degrees for additional convenience.

CERAMIC SOLEPLATE – The iron’s ceramic soleplate ensures a smooth glide over fabrics of any material without sticking, while also being resistant to scratches. It can also be used vertically to iron any hanging garments.

ANTI-DRIP – No mess will be made, as the soleplate design prevents dripping, and the iron’s self-cleaning tank saves time and effort. Designed with safety in mind, overheat protection is also built in.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description With Efficient Fast Charging Cordless Steam Iron This Cordless Steam Iron will provide you with a quick and convenient ironing experience. It charges on its base in just 40 seconds, and can be used freely afterwards without the hassle of a cord, which also allows for vertical steaming. The water tank holds up to 350ml of water, and this can be output as steam at a rate of 15 to 25g/min. Previous page Non-Stick Soleplate The specially designed soleplate prevents sticking, ensuring no damage to clothes or fabrics. Adjustable Thermostat Adjust the temperature between 70-220*C with ease, thanks to the accessible dial under the handle. Multi-Function The iron features mist spray and steam burst functions, and can also be used vertically for garments Self-Cleaning Mode Save time and effort with the iron's self-cleaning tank which prevents limescale build-up. 350ml Water Tank The 350ml capacity of the water tank allows you to iron plenty of clothes in one session. Next page 1 Non-Stick Soleplate 2 Adjustable Thermostat 3 Multi-Function 4 Self-Cleaning Mode 5 350ml Water Tank
